name: California Gasket and Rubber Corporation
message: Aviation and Aerospace Component ManufacturingCalifornia Gasket and Rubber Corporation (CGR) was established in 1942 and is comprised of two manufacturing divisions (Gasket and Rubber) housed in a 50,000 square foot manufacturing facility.Our team was successful in extracting the following documents:Corporate internal documents and agreementsHR documentsContact details of customers and employeesFinancial statements of the companyPersonnel documents with information on employeesThe icing on the cake:Passport scans
